key_risks: FOMC statement or press conference on June 17 produces hawkish surprise and triggers broad equity rotation
Post-holiday thin trading on June 22 amplifies any late-week reversal in semiconductor names
Oil-price stabilization or renewed geopolitical headlines offset the Iran-deal relief rally

portfolio.rationale: Strong recent momentum and semiconductor supply-chain exposure likely to benefit from risk-on sentiment post-Iran deal.
Heavy tech weighting aligns with observed 3.06% daily gain and continued AI-driven flows into the week.
Factor has led recent performance and should capture short-term trend continuation ahead of FOMC.
Sector breadth supports outperformance in low-volatility, growth-favorable environment.
Recent 6.21% 7-day return and event-driven upside potential over the compressed trading week.

portfolio_rationale: Concentrated tilt to high-momentum tech and semiconductor exposure captures observed leadership while staying within five holdings and 5% increments; FOMC and holiday compress the window but favor risk assets after the Iran-related oil drop.
rationale_summary: Recent price action and macro relief favor growth and momentum factors over the next five trading sessions; allocation prioritizes realized leaders with plausible continuation before the June 22 exit close.
